svg.text: Actors: Parent, Banking Web App, API Gateway, Youth Account Service, Account Service, Transaction Service, Payment Service
Parent logs in (OAuth2) → Banking Web App
API Gateway → Youth Account Service: Validate RBAC, Audit log
Youth Account Service → Account Service: Retrieve account balance
Youth Account Service → Transaction Service: Retrieve recent transactions
Youth Account Service → API Gateway: Compose dashboard response
API Gateway → Banking Web App: Return dashboard data
Parent initiates fund transfer → Banking Web App
API Gateway → Youth Account Service: Validate RBAC, Audit log
Youth Account Service → Payment Service: Execute fund transfer
Youth Account Service → Account Service: Update balance
Youth Account Service → API Gateway: Return transfer confirmation
API Gateway → Banking Web App: Show updated balance
